message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 9 more stub modules to ZigBuilder (batch 4)

Migrated simple stub modules:
- urllib_robotparser_mod.zig - robots.txt parser
- _multibytecodec_mod.zig - Multi-byte codec stubs
- _posixsubprocess_mod.zig - posixsubprocess stubs
- _py_abc_mod.zig - Pure Python ABC stubs
- _queue_mod.zig - Queue stubs
- _scproxy_mod.zig - macOS proxy stubs
- _sha1_mod.zig - SHA1 hash stubs
- _warnings_mod.zig - Warnings stubs
- atexit_mod.zig - Exit handlers

Progress: 37/308 modules migrated (12%)
